chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application No. 116 of 2020 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of main case. 2. For orders on CMA No. 522/2020 (Stay) 15.01.2026 Mr. Aamir Raza, advocate for applicant. Per learned counsel, the questions before the court have already been decided against the applicant / department, therefore, this reference application may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Ayaz P.S.
